int32.description: Variable-length encoding for signed 32-bit integers, inefficient for negative numbers

sint32.description: ZigZag-encoded signed 32-bit integer, efficient for negative values

bool.description: Boolean type encoded as a single varint byte

string.description: UTF-8 encoded text string, must always contain valid UTF-8

bytes.description: Arbitrary byte sequence for binary data

message.description: Defines a structured message type with numbered fields

enum.description: Defines an enumeration type, first value must be zero

repeated.description: Field modifier indicating zero or more values of the given type

map.description: Shorthand for repeated key-value pair message, keys must be integral or string
